mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[Search databases
PubMed, Embase,
Web of Science, CINAHL] --> B[Remove duplicates
using Covidence] B --> C[Title/Abstract screening
Two independent reviewers] C --> D{Disagreements?} D -->|Yes| E[Third reviewer
resolves conflict] D -->|No| F[Full-text review
Two independent reviewers] E --> F F --> G{Disagreements?} G -->|Yes| H[Senior author decides] G -->|No| I[Hand-search reference lists
of included papers] H --> I I --> J[Data extraction
Standardized REDCap form] J --> K[Quality assessment
Newcastle-Ottawa Scale] K --> L{Studies homogeneous?
I² < 50%} L -->|Yes| M[Meta-analysis] L -->|No| N[Narrative synthesis]
